IContentTypeMatcherContentTypeMatcher Property

One Identity Manager API Server
Gets or sets a custom function that determines if the specified content type matches this response builder. By default, only the content type is matched.

Namespace:  QBM.CompositionApi.Definition
Assembly:  QBM.CompositionApi.Server (in QBM.CompositionApi.Server.dll) Version: 9.3 v93-311513
Syntax
C#
Copy
Func<string, bool> ContentTypeMatcher { get; set; }

Property Value

Type: FuncString, Boolean
